name: Bower Bus Co
officers: John R. Bower (President, John R. Bower Bus Company affiliate)
registry_source: PA Dept of State (entity not directly confirmed via web; affiliated entities A.J. Bower Inc and John R. Bower Bus Company found via D&B)
notes: USDOT 1712032 is registered as A.J. BOWER INC at 800 E Fifth Street, Berwick PA 18603 (exact match to input address). A.J. Bower Inc operates DBA A.J. Limo Coach (charter/limo) plus 'Bower Bus Co' (school bus brand). A related entity John R. Bower Bus Company at 359 Bowers Rd appears to be the historical school-bus operator (founded mid-1960s, transitioned to second-gen John R. Bower in 1988, ~15 employees per D&B). The 11 power units / 11 drivers / Satisfactory safety rating (CR dated 5/3/2024) are for the consolidated A.J. Bower Inc USDOT. Treat carrier match as medium confidence due to multiple related Bower entities at overlapping addresses; school-bus-only fleet may differ.

name: Impiccini Brothers School Bus
entity_status: active (PA incorporated; David Impiccini's LinkedIn lists Owner at 'IMPICCINI BROTHERS SCHOOL BUSES, INC.')
registry_source: PA Dept of State (entity name confirmed via LinkedIn officer title and obituary; specific entity ID not retrieved via public web)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record located via web searches under 'Impiccini Brothers' or 'Impiccini School Buses'. As an intrastate-only PA school-bus carrier with fleet likely under USDOT threshold, the company may not be required to hold a USDOT number, or it operates under owner's personal name. Confirmed location at 73 Low Hill Rd, Brownsville, PA 15417 (Beth Center School District contract since ~1969). Estimated single-location operation with ~1 employee per Buzzfile (likely undercount). LinkedIn confirms entity name 'IMPICCINI BROTHERS SCHOOL BUSES, INC.' Joseph 'Jody' Sr. and David co-owned and operated the company for 50 years.

name: R & A Hitchcock Busing
carrier_operation: Intrastate Non-Hazmat, Authorized For Hire, Passenger (School Bus)
fmcsa_status: active (intrastate); SAFER snapshot currently flagged inactive but PA intrastate operating authority and recent MCS-150 indicate active operation
registry_source: PA Dept of State (DBA R&A HITCHCOCK BUSING LLC; legal name Richard H. Hitchcock); FMCSA USDOT 560840 originally registered 1994-04-20
notes: Exact address match (988 Creek Rd, Laceyville PA 18623). DBA R&A HITCHCOCK BUSING LLC under sole proprietor/legal name Richard H. Hitchcock. 2 school buses (16+ passenger), 2 drivers, intrastate non-hazmat passenger authorized for hire. ~35,000 annual miles (2024). Most recent record change 11/1/2024. Contact: (570) 869-1885 / abus424@ptd.net. SAFER currently shows the USDOT record as inactive in the public snapshot view, but Bubba.ai/BrokerSnapshot show active intrastate authority and recent MCS-150 updates suggest the carrier remains operational; status uncertainty noted.

notes: PA business corporation 'Mauthe Busing, Inc.' incorporated 12/31/2013; principal office at 18169 Route 322, Strattanville, PA 16258 (matches input). Operations currently run by James and Barbara George (relatives of the founding Mauthe family per local press). USDOT 163521 (William Mauthe DBA DGB Trucking) listed at RR 1 Strattanville is a separate Property carrier first registered ~1974, inactive since Feb 1988 — NOT the active school bus entity. The current Mauthe Busing Inc school-bus operation likely operates intrastate-only with fleet under FMCSA registration threshold, or under another USDOT not surfaced via public search. Co-located with Mauthe's Country Corner convenience store/restaurant.

name: S V L Bussing Inc
registry_source: Not located via public web search of PA Dept of State / general web
notes: No confident FMCSA SAFER record located via web search for 'S V L Bussing' or 'SVL Bussing' at Great Bend, PA (99 Maple St, 18821). Multiple unrelated SVL-prefixed carriers exist (SVL Enterprises, SVL Logistics, SVL Transport, SVL LLC, SVL Trucking) — none located in Great Bend PA or operating as passenger/school bus. Nearby PA carriers BUSSING-named entities (Lewis Bussing in Susquehanna, Nebzydoski Busing in Pleasant Mount) are distinct. Possible the entity is dissolved, very small intrastate-only operator without USDOT, or operates under a different legal name. PA Dept of State search via aggregators did not return a match. Recommend a direct file.dos.pa.gov entity search and PA PUC school bus operator records for confirmation.
